name: Stir-Fried Peppers with Scallops
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons Rice wine or dry sherry
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the sauce ingredients and set aside.
2. Wash the scallops, pat them dry with paper towels, and set aside.
3. Core and seed the peppers and cut them into 1-inch squares.
4. Heat a wok.
5. Add oil, green onions, garlic, and ginger to the hot wok and stir-fry for 10 seconds.
6. Add the peppers to the wok and stir-fry for 2 minutes.
7. Stir in the scallops and continue cooking for another 4 minutes.
8. Serve immediately.
